summary: Iteration 66 - Stock Linking Features Testing Complete. All features working correctly: (1) POST /api/caisse/products/auto-link-to-stock endpoint scans caisse products and links them to stock products with similarity >= 80%, (2) GET /api/caisse/products/stock-suggestions endpoint provides autocomplete suggestions for stock products, (3) ProductsTab shows X/Y linked badge with amber/green color, (4) Filter toggle to show only unlinked products, (5) 'Lier automatiquement' button performs bulk auto-linking with toast report, (6) Product creation modal has autocomplete suggestions panel with (délier) button, (7) LinkStockModal continues to work for manual linking.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend auto-link-to-stock endpoint (lines 3259-3351): Uses difflib.SequenceMatcher for name similarity, supports dry_run mode, returns detailed report with linked/ambiguous/no_match counts
Backend stock-suggestions endpoint (lines 3354-3403): Boosted scoring for prefix/contains matches (1.0=exact, 0.92=startswith, 0.85=contains), respects limit parameter
ProductsTab.jsx: useMemo for counters, handleAutoLink with window.confirm, badges with data-testid attributes, filter toggle state
CaissePage.jsx (lines 6084-6144): Autocomplete with 250ms debounce, stock-suggestions-panel with suggest-stock-{id} testids, (délier) button to unlink
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 83 caisse products and stock products
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 66 added stock linking features to Caisse Pro. The auto-link endpoint found 3 matches (Poulet Bicyclette Complet→Poulet bicyclette, Riz blanc→Riz blanc, Frite surgelée→Frites surgelees). Current state: 4/83 products linked to stock. The ProductsTab shows badges and filter toggle. Product creation modal has autocomplete suggestions for stock products.

GET /api/caisse/products/stock-suggestions with short/empty query - VERIFIED (returns empty)
Caisse products CRUD with stock_product_id - VERIFIED

Button 'Lier automatiquement' visible for Manager - VERIFIED
Auto-link button shows confirm dialog with preview count - VERIFIED
Auto-link toast shows 'Liaison automatique terminée' with detailed counts - VERIFIED
Clicking suggestion shows '🔗 Lié au stock : {nom}' - VERIFIED
LinkStockModal (manual link) continues to work - VERIFIED
Link icon (🔗) shown on linked product rows - VERIFIED
